title: rosa × schleicheri var. typica
intro: Rosa × schleicheri var. typica, also known as the Rosa × alba var. punicea, is a species of rose plant that belongs to the genus Rosa and is a hybrid of Rosa alba and Rosa rubiginosa. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its high concentration of salicylic acid, which is a compound similar to aspirin and provides anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. Rosa × schleicheri var. typica has been traditionally used to treat various health issues, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive problems, and its health benefits include reducing pain and inflammation, as well as promoting wound healing. The plant can be prepared into herbal remedies such as teas, infusions, and salves, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health conditions.
